rag_rules: Preserve AADL architecture by inserting AGREE annex blocks only in valid component type or implementation scopes
Use implementation annexes only for valid implementation-level bindings such as assignments
Ground every AGREE variable in the current AADL model or an explicit declaration
Do not encode AADL timing properties as AGREE expressions unless the model exposes explicit typed ports or constants for them
generic_rules: Insert AGREE annex blocks in the intended target component or implementation
Preserve existing AADL architecture during insertion
Ensure all AGREE variables are grounded in the current AADL model or explicitly declared
syntax_or_pattern_reminders: Place assumptions and guarantees in valid component type scopes
Use implementation annexes for implementation-level bindings
anti_patterns: Avoid inserting AGREE annex blocks in invalid scopes
Do not use subcomponent ports in component type contracts unless represented through valid variables or outputs
Avoid encoding AADL timing properties as AGREE expressions without explicit typed ports or constants
